overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a character in dark clothing navigating through a destroyed urban environment at night. The character walks through rubble-strewn streets with distant fires providing the only illumination in the post-apocalyptic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open destroyed urban plaza with scattered debris

agents.ego_description: character in dark clothing walking steadily through the open rubble field toward distant light sources

entered.detail: tall damaged concrete building with broken windows silhouetted against the night sky
scattered concrete chunks and debris covering the entire ground surface
orange glow from burning fires illuminating the background haze
low concrete wall partially collapsed blocking the direct path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open destroyed urban plaza at night. A ruined office building looms on the right while distant fires provide the only light. The ground is covered in gravel and concrete debris, with a broken barrier visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rubble corridor with wooden barricades

events.description: character moves from open plaza into a confined path with wooden barriers on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow path between rubble piles and wooden barricades, moving deeper into the ruins

entered.detail: broken wooden planks and posts forming a makeshift barrier along the path
uneven stone paving visible beneath the scattered rubble

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow enclosed path with wooden barricades on the left. The character continues walking forward on uneven cobblestones mixed with rubble. The large building on the right is left behind as the path becomes more confined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban wasteland that shifts from a wide-open plaza into a claustrophobic alleyway. It begins with the character traversing a vast, debris-strewn square at night, where a ruined office building looms to the right under the dim glow of distant fires. As the character moves forward past a broken barrier, the expansive space begins to contract, leaving the large building behind. The scene then transitions into a narrow enclosed path, where the open horizon is replaced by wooden barricades on the left. Finally, the camera follows the character as they navigate uneven cobblestones and rubble within the increasingly confined corridor.
